name: Claude Code CLI
description: Installs the Claude Code CLI into the dev container.

updateOnPostStart.description: Re-run the Claude Code installer during the dev container postStart phase to update to the latest version.

seedConfig.description: Seed ~/.claude/settings.json from a host mount (~/.cred-seed/claude/settings.json) or the image-baked default on first start only.

postStartCommand: d=/usr/local/share/devcontainer-feature-ai-assistant/claude; for s in update.sh seed-config.sh; do f="$d/$s"; if [ -x "$f" ]; then "$f"; fi; done
